content.full_text:
PHYLLI S
. .,\
La
PRICE-MEURER ELECTION COMMITTEE
P. O. BOX 1 247
SALINAS, CALIF. 93902
N$
April 26, 1991
Susan Bobrow
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J St. , Suite 800
Sacramento , Ca, 9581 4
Dear Ms. Bobrow,
We spoke on the phone on Wednesday, April 24, 1991 regarding
the receipt of contributions for someone running for .l-ocal
political office from another candidate's campaign fund. At that
time you stated that it is acceptable to transfer funds from one
candidate to another.
Please send me lrritten confirmation that a candidate can
transfer fund to another candidate as discussed during our phone
conversation.
Thank you for your assistance.
Sincerely,
Marilyn Dorman
Committee member

sections.question: We spoke on the phone on Wednesday, April 24, 1991 regarding the receipt of contributions for someone running for local political office from another candidate's campaign fund. At that time you stated that it is acceptable to transfer funds from one candidate to another. Please send me written confirmation that a candidate can transfer fund to another candidate as discussed during our phone conversation.
sections.question_synthetic: The requester seeks written confirmation that a candidate can legally transfer campaign funds to another candidate, referencing a prior phone conversation with FPPC staff.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an incoming request from a committee member to the FPPC, not an FPPC response letter. No formal QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections are present. The request references a prior phone conversation but seeks written confirmation. Document shows typical characteristics of an informal request letter rather than an official advice letter response.

embedding.qa_text: QUESTION: We spoke on the phone on Wednesday, April 24, 1991 regarding the receipt of contributions for someone running for local political office from another candidate's campaign fund. At that time you stated that it is acceptable to transfer funds from one candidate to another. Please send me written confirmation that a candidate can transfer fund to another candidate as discussed during our phone conversation.

embedding.summary: This is an incoming request letter from Marilyn Dorman of the Price-Meurer Election Committee asking the FPPC to provide written confirmation regarding the legality of transferring campaign funds between candidates, following a prior phone conversation.
